items.claim: Tuchelov possesses the ability to wrestle offensively.
items.quote: the thing about Tuchelov is he can wrestle offensively.

items.claim: Tuchelov is vulnerable to being taken down by wrestlers.
items.quote: This Gazv guy was wrestling him the whole time and was able to get a couple of takedowns

items.claim: Brenson Rivero possesses significant knockout power.
Brenson Rivero has a high level of finishing ability.
items.quote: He has a really good level of finishing ability.
